submitted_payload.tool_tagline: Free open-source AI coding workflow with plan-build-verify loops

verification.execution_method: Direct POST to the site's public WordPress AJAX submission endpoint using runtime-fetched nonce from the live submit page.

data.message: Tool submitted! We'll review it within 2–3 business days and email you at ken@hireaegis.com.

why_this_action: The May 23, 2026 audit still shows Codeberg adoption flat, so a fresh executable directory lane is higher leverage than more internal drafting.
VB Web AI Tools presents a coding/developer-tools category with self-reported large traffic and a free reviewed listing path that points directly to the primary Codeberg repo.
This target was not yet present in outreach-log.md, so it expands distribution instead of duplicating an in-flight lane.
The submission preserves Codeberg as the primary destination and keeps GitHub as mirror-only context.
expected_outcome: Qualified developers discover Ralph Workflow through a fresh developer-facing directory that links to the primary Codeberg repo.
replacement_condition: If there is no live VB Web AI Tools listing or referral evidence by 2026-06-06, treat this as pending-only and spend the next fresh-action slot on another untouched executable distribution lane or a sharper conversion surface.
